name: Technoblade The Quest Of L'Manburg
short_description: 10% of the profit of this game will be donated to Cancer Research.
detailed_description:
Update Notes

Story Mode: COMING SOON


About the Game

This Game In Inspired By The Journey Of Technoblade And The Dream SMP

This Experience Will Make You Feel How It Is In The Dream SMP As Technoblade.

This is mainly a survival and an open world game. Walk through this landscape that's surrounded by a wall. Walk through the forest and hear the birds sing. Visit the beach, climb the mountain and discover a medieval village. Watch the sunset and sunrise and be surprised by the ever-changing weather in this game.

ALL MUSIC IN THIS GAME IS MADE BY:

KNIGHT OF ENDALE

this Game Has Been ABANDONED
